{{Quote|What do '''YOU''' want? If you aren't a racer, you're nobody, so just leave me alone.|translated=1|Zeena, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Zeena''' was a yellow-skinned [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] living in [[Ahto City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] in and around [[3956 BBY]]. As an amateur [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|racer]], she would refuse to talk to anyone unless they were a racer as well.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player does choose to race on [[Ahto City swoop track|Manaan's swoop track]], then Zeena will talk, albeit grudgingly. As you rise up the ranks she will become more and more open to the player.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
